revision.text:
'''子安神社'''（こやすじんじゃ）は日本の各地にある神社の名称。安産・子育ての神が祀られていることが多い。
* [[子安神社 (八王子市)]]：[[東京都]][[八王子市]] * [[子安神社 (千葉市花見川区)]]：[[千葉県]][[千葉市]][[花見川区]]畑町 * [[子安神社 (習志野市)]]：[[千葉県]][[習志野市]]藤崎 * 子安神社：[[三重県]][[伊勢市]]の[[内宮]]所管社 * [[子安神社（三重県南牟婁郡紀宝町）]]：[[三重県]][[南牟婁郡]][[紀宝町]]神内 {{aimai}}

'''子安神社'''（こやすじんじゃ）は日本の各地にある[[神社]]の名称。安産・子育ての神が祀られていることが多い。
* [[子安神社 (かすみがうら市)]] - [[茨城県]][[かすみがうら市]]鎮座 * [[子安神社 (千葉市花見川区)]] - [[千葉県]][[千葉市]][[花見川区]]畑町鎮座 * [[子安神社 (習志野市)]] - 千葉県[[習志野市]]藤崎鎮座 * [[子安神社 (松戸市)]] - 千葉県[[松戸市]]八ヶ崎鎮座 * [[子安神社 (八王子市)]] - [[東京都]][[八王子市]]鎮座 * 子安神社 - [[三重県]][[伊勢市]]の[[内宮]]所管社 * [[子安神社 (紀宝町)]] - 三重県[[南牟婁郡]][[紀宝町]]神内鎮座

revision.text:
'''子安神社'''（こやすじんじゃ）は、主に[[安産]]・[[子育て]]の[[神]]が祀られている[[神社]]である。
[[富士山]]（[[浅間神社]]）の祭神でもある[[コノハナノサクヤビメ]]を祀る系統と、[[スサノオ]]の妻である[[クシナダヒメ]]を祀る系統などに分かれる。（神話上はどちらも[[オオヤマツミ]]の系統であり、前者が子、後者が孫という関係性になる。）
== 主な神社の一覧 == ===関東地方=== ;茨城県 * [[子安神社 (水戸市)]] - [[茨城県]][[水戸市]]千波町鎮座 * [[子安神社 (かすみがうら市)]] - 茨城県[[かすみがうら市]]東野寺鎮座 * [[子安神社 (利根町)]] - 茨城県[[北相馬郡]][[利根町]]大房鎮座 ;千葉県 * [[櫻井子安神社]] - [[千葉県]][[旭市]]桜井 * [[子安神社 (匝瑳市)]] - 千葉県[[匝瑳市]]横芝光町鎮座 * [[子安神社 (千葉市花見川区)]] - 千葉県[[千葉市]][[花見川区]]畑町鎮座 * [[子安神社 (市川市)]] - 千葉県[[市川市]]柏井町鎮座 * [[子安神社 (習志野市)]] - 千葉県[[習志野市]]藤崎鎮座 * [[子安神社 (松戸市)]] - 千葉県[[松戸市]]八ヶ崎鎮座 ;東京都 * [[子安八幡神社]] - [[東京都]][[大田区]]の[[仲池上]]と[[北糀谷]]に鎮座 * [[子安神社 (八王子市)]] - [[東京都]][[八王子市]]鎮座 ;神奈川県 * [[子安神社 (伊勢原市)]] - [[神奈川県]][[伊勢原市]]石田鎮座
===中部地方=== ;山梨県 * [[子安宮澤神社]] - [[山梨県]][[大月市]]賑岡町鎮座 * [[子安八幡神社 (甲府市)]] - 山梨県[[甲府市]]国母鎮座 ;静岡県 * [[新橋浅間神社|新橋子安神社]] - [[静岡県]][[御殿場市]]新橋、[[新橋浅間神社]]境内社 * [[子安神社 (富士宮市)]] - 静岡県[[富士宮市]]杉田鎮座 * [[子安八幡宮 (富士宮市)]] - 静岡県富士宮市沼久保鎮座 * [[子安神社 (浜松市東区)]] - 静岡県[[浜松市]][[東区 (浜松市)|東区]]白鳥町鎮座 ;岐阜県 * [[子安神社 (岐阜市)]] - [[岐阜県]][[岐阜市]]彦坂鎮座 * [[子安神社 (大垣市)]] - 岐阜県[[大垣市]]赤坂町鎮座 ;愛知県 * [[子安神社 (大府市)]] - [[愛知県]][[大府市]]共和町鎮座 ;石川県
* 子安神社 (加賀市) - 石川県加賀市小菅波町
* [[子安神社 (金沢市)]] - [[石川県]][[金沢市]]下安原町鎮座
===近畿地方=== ;三重県 * [[子安神社 (伊勢市)]] - [[三重県]][[伊勢市]]の[[皇大神宮|内宮]]所管社 * [[子安神社 (紀宝町)]] - 三重県[[南牟婁郡]][[紀宝町]]神内鎮座
===中国地方=== ;岡山県 * [[子安神社 (岡山市)]] - [[岡山県]][[岡山市]][[北区 (岡山市)|北区]]鎮座（吉備津彦神社境内社） ⇒ [[吉備津彦神社]]
== 関連項目 == * [[子守神社]] * [[子育明神]] * [[子安地蔵]] ** [[子安地蔵堂]] ** [[子安地蔵寺]] * [[子守地蔵]] * [[子育地蔵]] * [[水天宮]] {{曖昧さ回避}} {{デフォルトソート:こやすしんしや}} [[Category:神社 (祭神・信仰別)]] [[Category:同名の神社]] [[Category:出産]] [[Category:産育]] [[Category:育児]] {{shinto-stub}}

revision.text:
'''Koyasu Shrine''' (子安神社) is a type of [[Shinto shrine]] primarily dedicated to deities associated with [[safe childbirth]] and [[child-rearing]].
Shrines are generally divided into those enshrining [[Konohanasakuya-hime]], who is also the deity of [[Mount Fuji]] (and the main deity of [[Sengen Shrine]]), and those enshrining [[Kushinadahime]], the wife of [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]]. Both deities are genealogically related, with the former being the child and the latter being the grandchild of [[Ōyamatsumi]].
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Mito)|ja|子安神社 (水戸市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Mito)|qq=}} - Located in Chidami, Mito City, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Kasumigaura)|ja|子安神社 (かすみがうら市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Kasumigaura)|qq=}} - Located in Higashinoji, Kasumigaura City, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Tone)|ja|子安神社 (利根町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Tone)|qq=}} - Located in Obusa, Tone Town, Kita-Soma District, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Sakurai Koyasu Shrine|ja|櫻井子安神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakurai Koyasu Shrine|qq=}} - '''Koyasu Shrine''' (子安神社) is a type of [[Shinto shrine]] primarily dedicated to deities associated with [[safe childbirth]] and [[child-rearing]].
Shrines are generally divided into those enshrining [[Konohanasakuya-hime]], who is also the deity of [[Mount Fuji]] (and the main deity of [[Sengen Shrine]]), and those enshrining [[Kushinadahime]], the wife of [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]]. Both deities are genealogically related, with the former being the child and the latter being the grandchild of [[Ōyamatsumi]].

'''Koyasu Shrine''' (子安神社) is a type of [[Shinto shrine]] primarily dedicated to deities associated with [[safe childbirth]] and [[child-rearing]].
Shrines are generally divided into those enshrining [[Konohanasakuya-hime]], who is also the deity of [[Mount Fuji]] (and the main deity of [[Sengen Shrine]]), and those enshrining [[Kushinadahime]], the wife of [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]]. Both deities are genealogically related, with the former being the child and the latter being the grandchild of [[Ōyamatsumi]].

<!--Koyasu Shrine--><!--Koyasu Shrine--> <!--Doing this to bump these pages because my history retrieval attempts have led to category caching errors-->[[sn:Koyasu Shrine]]{{translated page|ja|子安神社|version=102329956|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[Category:Shrine disambiguations]] [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] [[Category:産育]] [[Category:Shinto shrines by tradition]] [[Category:Child care]]

'''Koyasu Shrine''' (子安神社) is a type of [[Shinto shrine]] primarily dedicated to deities associated with [[safe childbirth]] and [[child-rearing]].
Shrines are generally divided into those enshrining [[Konohanasakuya-hime]], who is also the deity of [[Mount Fuji]] (and the main deity of [[Sengen Shrine]]), and those enshrining [[Kushinadahime]], the wife of [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]]. Both deities are genealogically related, with the former being the child and the latter being the grandchild of [[Ōyamatsumi]].

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Completed disambiguations
revision.text:
'''Koyasu Shrine''' (子安神社) is a type of [[Shinto shrine]] primarily dedicated to deities associated with [[safe childbirth]] and [[child-rearing]].
Shrines are generally divided into those enshrining [[Konohanasakuya-hime]], who is also the deity of [[Mount Fuji]] (and the main deity of [[Sengen Shrine]]), and those enshrining [[Kushinadahime]], the wife of [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]]. Both deities are genealogically related, with the former being the child and the latter being the grandchild of [[Ōyamatsumi]].
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Mito)|ja|子安神社 (水戸市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Mito)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Chidami, Mito City, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Kasumigaura)|ja|子安神社 (かすみがうら市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Kasumigaura)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - revision.text:
'''Koyasu Shrine''' (子安神社) is a type of [[Shinto shrine]] primarily dedicated to deities associated with [[safe childbirth]] and [[:en:child-rearing|child-rearing]].
Shrines are generally divided into those enshrining [[Konohanasakuya-hime]], who is also the deity of [[Mount Fuji]] (and the main deity of [[Sengen Shrine]]), and those enshrining [[Kushinadahime]], the wife of [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]]. Both deities are genealogically related, with the former being the child and the latter being the grandchild of [[Ōyamatsumi]].
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Mito)|ja|子安神社 (水戸市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Mito)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Chidami, Mito City, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Kasumigaura)|ja|子安神社 (かすみがうら市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Kasumigaura)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Higashinoji, Kasumigaura City, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Tone)|ja|子安神社 (利根町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Tone)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Obusa, Tone Town, Kita-Soma District, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Sakurai Koyasu Shrine|ja|櫻井子安神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakurai Koyasu Shrine|qq=}} - Located in Sakurai, Asahi City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Sosa)|ja|子安神社 (匝瑳市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Sosa)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Yokoshiba, Sosa City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Hanamigawa)|ja|子安神社 (千葉市花見川区)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Hanamigawa)|qq=}} - Located in Hatamachi, Hanamigawa Ward, Chiba City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Ichikawa)|ja|子安神社 (市川市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Ichikawa)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kashiwaimachi, Ichikawa City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Narashino)|ja|子安神社 (習志野市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Narashino)|qq=}} - Located in Fujisaki, Narashino City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Matsudo)|ja|子安神社 (松戸市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Matsudo)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Yagasaki, Matsudo City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Hachiman Shrine|ja|子安八幡神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Hachiman Shrine|qq=}} - Located in Nakaiikegami and Kitakojiya, Ota Ward, Tokyo. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Hachioji)|ja|子安神社 (八王子市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Hachioji)|qq=}} - Located in Hachioji City, Tokyo. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Isehara)|ja|子安神社 (伊勢原市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Isehara)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Ishida, Isehara City, Kanagawa Prefecture.
== Chubu Region == * {{ill|Koyasumiya Shrine|ja|子安宮澤神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasumiya Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Nigioka Town, Otsuki City, Yamanashi Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Hachiman Shrine (Kofu)|ja|子安八幡神社 (甲府市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Hachiman Shrine (Kofu)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kokubo, Kofu City, Yamanashi Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Kawazu)|ja|子安神社 (河津町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Kawazu)|qq=}} - Located in Nawa, Kawazu Town, Kamo District, Shizuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Shimbashi Sengen Shrine|ja|新橋浅間神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimbashi Sengen Shrine|qq=}} - Koyasu Shrine as a subordinate shrine of Shimbashi Sengen Shrine, Gotemba City, Shizuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Fujinomiya)|ja|子安神社 (富士宮市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Fujinomiya)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Sugita, Fujinomiya City, Shizuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Hachimangu (Fujinomiya)|ja|子安八幡宮 (富士宮市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Hachimangu (Fujinomiya)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Numakubo, Fujinomiya City, Shizuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Hamamatsu)|ja|子安神社 (浜松市東区)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Hamamatsu)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Shiratori Town, Hamamatsu City, Shizuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Gifu)|ja|子安神社 (岐阜市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Gifu)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Hikosaka, Gifu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Ogaki)|ja|子安神社 (大垣市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Ogaki)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Akasaka Town, Ogaki City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Obu)|ja|子安神社 (大府市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Obu)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kyowa Town, Obu City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Kaga)|ja|子安神社 (加賀市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Kaga)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kosugawara Town, Kaga City, Ishikawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Kanazawa)|ja|子安神社 (金沢市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Kanazawa)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Shimoasahara Town, Kanazawa City, Ishikawa Prefecture.
== Kinki Region == * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Ise)|ja|子安神社 (伊勢市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Ise)|qq=}} - Located in Ise City, Mie Prefecture, under the jurisdiction of the {{ill|Inner Shrine|ja|皇大神宮|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inner Shrine|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Kihoku)|ja|子安神社 (紀宝町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Kihoku)|qq=}} - Located in Jinai, Kiho Town, Minami-Muro District, Mie Prefecture.
== Chugoku Region == * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Okayama)|ja|子安神社 (岡山市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Okayama)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kita Ward, Okayama City, Okayama Prefecture. A subordinate shrine of [[:en:Kibitsuhiko Shrine|Kibitsuhiko Shrine]]. == See Also == * {{ill|Komori Shrine|ja|子守神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Komori Shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Kosodate Myōjin|ja|子育明神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kosodate Myōjin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 護王神社}} * {{ill|Koyasu Jizō|ja|子安地蔵|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Jizō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ** {{ill|Koyasu Jizō Hall|ja|子安地蔵堂|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Jizō Hall|qq=}} ** {{ill|Koyasu Jizō Temple|ja|子安地蔵寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Jizō Temple|qq=}} * {{ill|Komori Jizō|ja|子守地蔵|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Komori Jizō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Kosodate Jizō|ja|子育地蔵|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kosodate Jizō|qq=}} * [[:en:Suitengū|Suitengū]]

revision.text:
'''Koyasu Shrine''' (子安神社) is a type of [[Shinto shrine]] primarily dedicated to deities associated with [[safe childbirth]] and [[:en:child-rearing|child-rearing]].
Shrines are generally divided into those enshrining [[Konohanasakuya-hime]], who is also the deity of [[:en:Mount Fuji|Mount Fuji]] (and the main deity of [[:en:Sengen Shrine|Sengen Shrine]]), and those enshrining [[Kushinadahime]], the wife of [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]]. Both deities are genealogically related, with the former being the child and the latter being the grandchild of [[Ōyamatsumi]].
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Mito)|ja|子安神社 (水戸市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Mito)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Chidami, Mito City, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Kasumigaura)|ja|子安神社 (かすみがうら市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Kasumigaura)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Obusa, Tone Town, Kita-Soma District, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Sakurai Koyasu Shrine|ja|櫻井子安神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakurai Koyasu Shrine|qq=}} - Located in Sakurai, Asahi City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Sosa)|ja|子安神社 (匝瑳市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Sosa)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - revision.comment: Merge [[Category:産育]] into [[Category:Childbirth and rearing]] via bot
revision.text:
'''Koyasu Shrine''' (子安神社) is a type of [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] primarily dedicated to deities associated with [[safe childbirth]] and [[:en:child-rearing|child-rearing]].
Shrines are generally divided into those enshrining [[Konohanasakuya-hime]], who is also the deity of [[:en:Mount Fuji|Mount Fuji]] (and the main deity of [[:en:Sengen Shrine|Sengen Shrine]]), and those enshrining [[Kushinadahime]], the wife of [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]]. Both deities are genealogically related, with the former being the child and the latter being the grandchild of [[Ōyamatsumi]].
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Mito)|ja|子安神社 (水戸市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Mito)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Chidami, Mito City, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Kasumigaura)|ja|子安神社 (かすみがうら市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Kasumigaura)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Higashinoji, Kasumigaura City, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Tone)|ja|子安神社 (利根町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Tone)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Obusa, Tone Town, Kita-Soma District, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Sakurai Koyasu Shrine|ja|櫻井子安神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakurai Koyasu Shrine|qq=}} - Located in Sakurai, Asahi City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Sosa)|ja|子安神社 (匝瑳市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Sosa)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Yokoshiba, Sosa City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Hanamigawa)|ja|子安神社 (千葉市花見川区)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Hanamigawa)|qq=}} - Located in Hatamachi, Hanamigawa Ward, Chiba City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Ichikawa)|ja|子安神社 (市川市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Ichikawa)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kashiwaimachi, Ichikawa City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Narashino)|ja|子安神社 (習志野市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Narashino)|qq=}} - Located in Fujisaki, Narashino City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Matsudo)|ja|子安神社 (松戸市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Matsudo)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Yagasaki, Matsudo City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Hachiman Shrine|ja|子安八幡神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Hachiman Shrine|qq=}} - Located in Nakaiikegami and Kitakojiya, Ota Ward, Tokyo. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Hachioji)|ja|子安神社 (八王子市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Hachioji)|qq=}} - Located in Hachioji City, Tokyo. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Isehara)|ja|子安神社 (伊勢原市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Isehara)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Ishida, Isehara City, Kanagawa Prefecture.
== Chubu Region == * {{ill|Koyasumiya Shrine|ja|子安宮澤神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasumiya Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Nigioka Town, Otsuki City, Yamanashi Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Hachiman Shrine (Kofu)|ja|子安八幡神社 (甲府市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Hachiman Shrine (Kofu)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kokubo, Kofu City, Yamanashi Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Kawazu)|ja|子安神社 (河津町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Kawazu)|qq=}} - Located in Nawa, Kawazu Town, Kamo District, Shizuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Shimbashi Sengen Shrine|ja|新橋浅間神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimbashi Sengen Shrine|qq=}} - Koyasu Shrine as a subordinate shrine of Shimbashi Sengen Shrine, Gotemba City, Shizuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Fujinomiya)|ja|子安神社 (富士宮市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Fujinomiya)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kyowa Town, Obu City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Kaga)|ja|子安神社 (加賀市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Kaga)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kosugawara Town, Kaga City, Ishikawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Kanazawa)|ja|子安神社 (金沢市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Kanazawa)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Shimoasahara Town, Kanazawa City, Ishikawa Prefecture.
== Kinki Region == * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Ise)|ja|子安神社 (伊勢市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Ise)|qq=}} - Located in Ise City, Mie Prefecture, under the jurisdiction of the {{ill|Inner Shrine|ja|皇大神宮|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inner Shrine|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Kihoku)|ja|子安神社 (紀宝町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Kihoku)|qq=}} - Located in Jinai, Kiho Town, Minami-Muro District, Mie Prefecture.
== Chugoku Region == * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Okayama)|ja|子安神社 (岡山市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Okayama)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kita Ward, Okayama City, Okayama Prefecture. {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11447896]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Koyasu Shrine''' (子安神社) is a type of [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] primarily dedicated to deities associated with [[safe childbirth]] and [[:en:child-rearing|child-rearing]].
Shrines are generally divided into those enshrining [[Konohanasakuya-hime]], who is also the deity of [[:en:Mount Fuji|Mount Fuji]] (and the main deity of [[:en:Sengen Shrine|Sengen Shrine]]), and those enshrining [[Kushinadahime]], the wife of [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]]. Both deities are genealogically related, with the former being the child and the latter being the grandchild of [[Ōyamatsumi]].

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11447896]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Koyasu Shrine''' (子安神社) is a type of [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] primarily dedicated to deities associated with [[safe childbirth]] and [[:en:child-rearing|child-rearing]].
Shrines are generally divided into those enshrining [[Konohanasakuya-hime]], who is also the deity of [[:en:Mount Fuji|Mount Fuji]] (and the main deity of [[:en:Sengen Shrine|Sengen Shrine]]), and those enshrining [[Kushinadahime]], the wife of [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]]. Both deities are genealogically related, with the former being the child and the latter being the grandchild of [[Ōyamatsumi]].

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11447896]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Koyasu Shrine''' (子安神社) is a type of [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] primarily dedicated to deities associated with [[safe childbirth]] and [[:en:child-rearing|child-rearing]].
Shrines are generally divided into those enshrining [[Konohanasakuya-hime]], who is also the deity of [[:en:Mount Fuji|Mount Fuji]] (and the main deity of [[:en:Sengen Shrine|Sengen Shrine]]), and those enshrining [[Kushinadahime]], the wife of [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]]. Both deities are genealogically related, with the former being the child and the latter being the grandchild of [[Ōyamatsumi]].

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11447896]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Koyasu Shrine''' (子安神社) is a type of [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] primarily dedicated to deities associated with [[safe childbirth]] and [[:en:child-rearing|child-rearing]].
Shrines are generally divided into those enshrining [[Konohanasakuya-hime]], who is also the deity of [[:en:Mount Fuji|Mount Fuji]] (and the main deity of [[:en:Sengen Shrine|Sengen Shrine]]), and those enshrining [[Kushinadahime]], the wife of [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]]. Both deities are genealogically related, with the former being the child and the latter being the grandchild of [[Ōyamatsumi]].

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11447896]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Koyasu Shrine''' (子安神社) is a type of [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] primarily dedicated to deities associated with [[safe childbirth]] and [[:en:child-rearing|child-rearing]].
Shrines are generally divided into those enshrining [[Konohanasakuya-hime]], who is also the deity of [[:en:Mount Fuji|Mount Fuji]] (and the main deity of [[:en:Sengen Shrine|Sengen Shrine]]), and those enshrining [[Kushinadahime]], the wife of [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]]. Both deities are genealogically related, with the former being the child and the latter being the grandchild of [[Ōyamatsumi]].

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11447896]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Koyasu Shrine''' (子安神社) is a type of [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] primarily dedicated to deities associated with [[safe childbirth]] and [[:en:child-rearing|child-rearing]].
Shrines are generally divided into those enshrining [[Konohanasakuya-hime]], who is also the deity of [[:en:Mount Fuji|Mount Fuji]] (and the main deity of [[:en:Sengen Shrine|Sengen Shrine]]), and those enshrining [[Kushinadahime]], the wife of [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]]. Both deities are genealogically related, with the former being the child and the latter being the grandchild of [[Ōyamatsumi]].

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11447896]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Koyasu Shrine''' (子安神社) is a type of [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] primarily dedicated to deities associated with [[safe childbirth]] and [[:en:child-rearing|child-rearing]].
Shrines are generally divided into those enshrining [[Konohanasakuya-hime]], who is also the deity of [[:en:Mount Fuji|Mount Fuji]] (and the main deity of [[:en:Sengen Shrine|Sengen Shrine]]), and those enshrining [[Kushinadahime]], the wife of [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]]. Both deities are genealogically related, with the former being the child and the latter being the grandchild of [[Ōyamatsumi]].

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11447896]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Koyasu Shrine''' (子安神社) is a type of [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] primarily dedicated to deities associated with [[safe childbirth]] and [[:en:child-rearing|child-rearing]].
Shrines are generally divided into those enshrining [[Konohanasakuya-hime]], who is also the deity of [[:en:Mount Fuji|Mount Fuji]] (and the main deity of [[:en:Sengen Shrine|Sengen Shrine]]), and those enshrining [[Kushinadahime]], the wife of [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]]. Both deities are genealogically related, with the former being the child and the latter being the grandchild of [[Ōyamatsumi]].

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11447896]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Koyasu Shrine''' (子安神社) is a type of [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] primarily dedicated to deities associated with [[safe childbirth]] and [[:en:child-rearing|child-rearing]].
Shrines are generally divided into those enshrining [[Konohanasakuya-hime]], who is also the deity of [[:en:Mount Fuji|Mount Fuji]] (and the main deity of [[:en:Sengen Shrine|Sengen Shrine]]), and those enshrining [[Kushinadahime]], the wife of [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]]. Both deities are genealogically related, with the former being the child and the latter being the grandchild of [[Ōyamatsumi]].

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11447896]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Koyasu Shrine''' (子安神社) is a type of [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] primarily dedicated to deities associated with [[safe childbirth]] and [[:en:child-rearing|child-rearing]].
Shrines are generally divided into those enshrining [[Konohanasakuya-hime]], who is also the deity of [[:en:Mount Fuji|Mount Fuji]] (and the main deity of [[:en:Sengen Shrine|Sengen Shrine]]), and those enshrining [[Kushinadahime]], the wife of [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]]. Both deities are genealogically related, with the former being the child and the latter being the grandchild of [[Ōyamatsumi]].

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11447896]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Koyasu Shrine''' (子安神社) is a type of [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] primarily dedicated to deities associated with [[safe childbirth]] and [[:en:child-rearing|child-rearing]].
Shrines are generally divided into those enshrining [[Konohanasakuya-hime]], who is also the deity of [[:en:Mount Fuji|Mount Fuji]] (and the main deity of [[:en:Sengen Shrine|Sengen Shrine]]), and those enshrining [[Kushinadahime]], the wife of [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]]. Both deities are genealogically related, with the former being the child and the latter being the grandchild of [[Ōyamatsumi]].

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11447896]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Koyasu Shrine''' (子安神社) is a type of [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] primarily dedicated to deities associated with [[safe childbirth]] and [[:en:child-rearing|child-rearing]].
Shrines are generally divided into those enshrining [[Konohanasakuya-hime]], who is also the deity of [[:en:Mount Fuji|Mount Fuji]] (and the main deity of [[:en:Sengen Shrine|Sengen Shrine]]), and those enshrining [[Kushinadahime]], the wife of [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]]. Both deities are genealogically related, with the former being the child and the latter being the grandchild of [[Ōyamatsumi]].

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11447896]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Koyasu Shrine''' (子安神社) is a type of [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] primarily dedicated to deities associated with [[safe childbirth]] and [[:en:child-rearing|child-rearing]].
Shrines are generally divided into those enshrining [[Konohanasakuya-hime]], who is also the deity of [[:en:Mount Fuji|Mount Fuji]] (and the main deity of [[:en:Sengen Shrine|Sengen Shrine]]), and those enshrining [[Kushinadahime]], the wife of [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]]. Both deities are genealogically related, with the former being the child and the latter being the grandchild of [[Ōyamatsumi]].
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Mito)|ja|子安神社 (水戸市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Mito)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Chidami, Mito City, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Kasumigaura)|ja|子安神社 (かすみがうら市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Kasumigaura)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135506294}} - <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:子安神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11447896]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Koyasu Shrine''' (子安神社) is a type of [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] primarily dedicated to deities associated with [[safe childbirth]] and [[:en:child-rearing|child-rearing]].
Shrines are generally divided into those enshrining [[Konohanasakuya-hime]], who is also the deity of [[:en:Mount Fuji|Mount Fuji]] (and the main deity of [[:en:Sengen Shrine|Sengen Shrine]]), and those enshrining [[Kushinadahime]], the wife of [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]]. Both deities are genealogically related, with the former being the child and the latter being the grandchild of [[Ōyamatsumi]].

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:子安神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11447896]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Koyasu Shrine''' (子安神社) is a type of [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] primarily dedicated to deities associated with [[safe childbirth]] and [[:en:child-rearing|child-rearing]].
Shrines are generally divided into those enshrining [[Konohanasakuya-hime]], who is also the deity of [[:en:Mount Fuji|Mount Fuji]] (and the main deity of [[:en:Sengen Shrine|Sengen Shrine]]), and those enshrining [[Kushinadahime]], the wife of [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]]. Both deities are genealogically related, with the former being the child and the latter being the grandchild of [[Ōyamatsumi]].

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:子安神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11447896]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Koyasu Shrine''' (子安神社) is a type of [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] primarily dedicated to deities associated with [[safe childbirth]] and [[:en:child-rearing|child-rearing]].
Shrines are generally divided into those enshrining [[Konohanasakuya-hime]], who is also the deity of [[:en:Mount Fuji|Mount Fuji]] (and the main deity of [[:en:Sengen Shrine|Sengen Shrine]]), and those enshrining [[Kushinadahime]], the wife of [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]]. Both deities are genealogically related, with the former being the child and the latter being the grandchild of [[Ōyamatsumi]].

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:子安神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11447896]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Koyasu Shrine''' (子安神社) is a type of [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] primarily dedicated to deities associated with [[safe childbirth]] and [[:en:child-rearing|child-rearing]].
Shrines are generally divided into those enshrining [[Konohanasakuya-hime]], who is also the deity of [[:en:Mount Fuji|Mount Fuji]] (and the main deity of [[:en:Sengen Shrine|Sengen Shrine]]), and those enshrining [[Kushinadahime]], the wife of [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]]. Both deities are genealogically related, with the former being the child and the latter being the grandchild of [[Ōyamatsumi]].
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Mito)|ja|子安神社 (水戸市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Mito)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Chidami, Mito City, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Kasumigaura)|ja|子安神社 (かすみがうら市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Kasumigaura)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135506294}} - Located in Higashinoji, Kasumigaura City, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Tone)|ja|子安神社 (利根町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Tone)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135506297}} - Located in Obusa, Tone Town, Kita-Soma District, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Sakurai Koyasu Shrine|ja|櫻井子安神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakurai Koyasu Shrine|qq=}} - Located in Sakurai, Asahi City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Sosa)|ja|子安神社 (匝瑳市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Sosa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135506298}} - Located in Yokoshiba, Sosa City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Hanamigawa)|ja|子安神社 (千葉市花見川区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Hanamigawa)|1=Koyasujinja (Chiba)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q134926913}} - Located in Hatamachi, Hanamigawa Ward, Chiba City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Ichikawa)|ja|子安神社 (市川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Ichikawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135506300}} - Located in Kashiwaimachi, Ichikawa City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Narashino)|ja|子安神社 (習志野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Narashino)|1=Koyasu Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11447897}} - Located in Yagasaki, Matsudo City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Hachiman Shrine|ja|子安八幡神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Hachiman Shrine|1=Koyasu-Hachiman Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11447884}} - Located in Nakaiikegami and Kitakojiya, Ota Ward, Tokyo. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Hachioji)|ja|子安神社 (八王子市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Hachioji)|qq=}} - Located in Hachioji City, Tokyo. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Isehara)|ja|子安神社 (伊勢原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Isehara)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135506303}} - Located in Kyowa Town, Obu City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Kaga)|ja|子安神社 (加賀市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Kaga)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135506320}} - Located in Kosugawara Town, Kaga City, Ishikawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Kanazawa)|ja|子安神社 (金沢市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Kanazawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135506323}} - <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:子安神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11447896]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Koyasu Shrine''' (子安神社) is a type of [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] primarily dedicated to deities associated with [[safe childbirth]] and [[:en:child-rearing|child-rearing]].
Shrines are generally divided into those enshrining [[Konohanasakuya-hime]], who is also the deity of [[:en:Mount Fuji|Mount Fuji]] (and the main deity of [[:en:Sengen Shrine|Sengen Shrine]]), and those enshrining [[Kushinadahime]], the wife of [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]]. Both deities are genealogically related, with the former being the child and the latter being the grandchild of [[Ōyamatsumi]].

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:子安神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11447896]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Koyasu Shrine''' (子安神社) is a type of [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] primarily dedicated to deities associated with [[safe childbirth]] and [[:en:child-rearing|child-rearing]].
Shrines are generally divided into those enshrining [[Konohanasakuya-hime]], who is also the deity of [[:en:Mount Fuji|Mount Fuji]] (and the main deity of [[:en:Sengen Shrine|Sengen Shrine]]), and those enshrining [[Kushinadahime]], the wife of [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]]. Both deities are genealogically related, with the former being the child and the latter being the grandchild of [[Ōyamatsumi]].
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Mito)|ja|子安神社 (水戸市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Mito)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Chidami, Mito City, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Kasumigaura)|ja|子安神社 (かすみがうら市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Kasumigaura)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135506294}} - <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:子安神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11447896]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Koyasu Shrine''' (子安神社) is a type of [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] primarily dedicated to deities associated with [[safe childbirth]] and [[:en:child-rearing|child-rearing]].
Shrines are generally divided into those enshrining [[Konohanasakuya-hime]], who is also the deity of [[:en:Mount Fuji|Mount Fuji]] (and the main deity of [[:en:Sengen Shrine|Sengen Shrine]]), and those enshrining [[Kushinadahime]], the wife of [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]]. Both deities are genealogically related, with the former being the child and the latter being the grandchild of [[Ōyamatsumi]].
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Mito)|ja|子安神社 (水戸市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Mito)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Chidami, Mito City, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Kasumigaura)|ja|子安神社 (かすみがうら市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Kasumigaura)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135506294}} - <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:子安神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:子安神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11447896]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Koyasu Shrine''' (子安神社) is a type of [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] primarily dedicated to deities associated with [[safe childbirth]] and [[:en:child-rearing|child-rearing]].
Shrines are generally divided into those enshrining [[Konohanasakuya-hime]], who is also the deity of [[:en:Mount Fuji|Mount Fuji]] (and the main deity of [[:en:Sengen Shrine|Sengen Shrine]]), and those enshrining [[Kushinadahime]], the wife of [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]]. Both deities are genealogically related, with the former being the child and the latter being the grandchild of [[Ōyamatsumi]].

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:子安神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:子安神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:子安神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11447896]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Koyasu Shrine''' (子安神社) is a type of [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] primarily dedicated to deities associated with [[safe childbirth]] and [[:en:child-rearing|child-rearing]].
Shrines are generally divided into those enshrining [[Konohanasakuya-hime]], who is also the deity of [[:en:Mount Fuji|Mount Fuji]] (and the main deity of [[:en:Sengen Shrine|Sengen Shrine]]), and those enshrining [[Kushinadahime]], the wife of [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]]. Both deities are genealogically related, with the former being the child and the latter being the grandchild of [[Ōyamatsumi]].
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Mito)|ja|子安神社 (水戸市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Mito)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Chidami, Mito City, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Kasumigaura)|ja|子安神社 (かすみがうら市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Kasumigaura)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135506294}} - Located in Nakaiikegami and Kitakojiya, Ota Ward, Tokyo. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Hachioji)|ja|子安神社 (八王子市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Hachioji)|qq=}} - Located in Hachioji City, Tokyo. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Isehara)|ja|子安神社 (伊勢原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Isehara)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135506303}} - Shrines are generally divided into those enshrining [[Konohanasakuya-hime]], who is also the deity of [[:en:Mount Fuji|Mount Fuji]] (and the main deity of [[:en:Sengen Shrine|Sengen Shrine]]), and those enshrining [[Kushinadahime]], the wife of [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]]. Both deities are genealogically related, with the former being the child and the latter being the grandchild of [[Ōyamatsumi]].

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:子安神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:子安神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:子安神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11447896]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Koyasu Shrine''' (子安神社) is a type of {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}} primarily dedicated to deities associated with [[safe childbirth]] and [[:en:child-rearing|child-rearing]].
Shrines are generally divided into those enshrining [[Konohanasakuya-hime]], who is also the deity of {{ill|Mount Fuji|en|Mount Fuji|WD=Q39231|lt=Mount Fuji}} (and the main deity of [[:en:Sengen Shrine|Sengen Shrine]]), and those enshrining [[Kushinadahime]], the wife of [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]]. Both deities are genealogically related, with the former being the child and the latter being the grandchild of [[Ōyamatsumi]].
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Mito)|ja|子安神社 (水戸市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Mito)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Chidami, Mito City, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Kasumigaura)|ja|子安神社 (かすみがうら市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Kasumigaura)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135506294}} - Located in Obusa, Tone Town, Kita-Soma District, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Sakurai Koyasu Shrine|ja|櫻井子安神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakurai Koyasu Shrine|qq=}} - Located in Sakurai, Asahi City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Sosa)|ja|子安神社 (匝瑳市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Sosa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135506298}} - '''Koyasu Shrine''' (子安神社) is a type of {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}} primarily dedicated to deities associated with [[safe childbirth]] and [[:en:child-rearing|child-rearing]].
Shrines are generally divided into those enshrining [[Konohanasakuya-hime]], who is also the deity of {{ill|Mount Fuji|en|Mount Fuji|WD=Q39231|lt=Mount Fuji}} (and the main deity of [[:en:Sengen Shrine|Sengen Shrine]]), and those enshrining [[Kushinadahime]], the wife of [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]]. Both deities are genealogically related, with the former being the child and the latter being the grandchild of [[Ōyamatsumi]].

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:子安神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:子安神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:子安神社]]
'''Koyasu Shrine''' (子安神社) is a type of {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}} primarily dedicated to deities associated with [[safe childbirth]] and [[:en:child-rearing|child-rearing]].
Shrines are generally divided into those enshrining [[Konohanasakuya-hime]], who is also the deity of {{ill|Mount Fuji|en|Mount Fuji|WD=Q39231|lt=Mount Fuji}} (and the main deity of [[:en:Sengen Shrine|Sengen Shrine]]), and those enshrining [[Kushinadahime]], the wife of [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]]. Both deities are genealogically related, with the former being the child and the latter being the grandchild of [[Ōyamatsumi]].
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Mito)|ja|子安神社 (水戸市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Mito)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Chidami, Mito City, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Kasumigaura)|ja|子安神社 (かすみがうら市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Kasumigaura)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135506294}} - <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:子安神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:子安神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:子安神社]]
'''Koyasu Shrine''' (子安神社) is a type of {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} primarily dedicated to deities associated with [[safe childbirth]] and [[:en:child-rearing|child-rearing]].
Shrines are generally divided into those enshrining [[Konohanasakuya-hime]], who is also the deity of {{ill|Mount Fuji|en|Mount Fuji|WD=Q39231|lt=Mount Fuji|1=Mount Fuji}} (and the main deity of [[:en:Sengen Shrine|Sengen Shrine]]), and those enshrining [[Kushinadahime]], the wife of [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]]. Both deities are genealogically related, with the former being the child and the latter being the grandchild of [[Ōyamatsumi]].
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Mito)|ja|子安神社 (水戸市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Mito)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Chidami, Mito City, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Kasumigaura)|ja|子安神社 (かすみがうら市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Kasumigaura)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135506294|1=Koyasu Shrine (Kasumigaura)}} - Located in Higashinoji, Kasumigaura City, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Tone)|ja|子安神社 (利根町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Tone)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135506297|1=Koyasu Shrine (Tone)}} - Located in Obusa, Tone Town, Kita-Soma District, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Sakurai Koyasu Shrine|ja|櫻井子安神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakurai Koyasu Shrine|qq=}} - Located in Sakurai, Asahi City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Sosa)|ja|子安神社 (匝瑳市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Sosa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135506298|1=Koyasu Shrine (Sosa)}} - Located in Yokoshiba, Sosa City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Hanamigawa)|ja|子安神社 (千葉市花見川区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Hanamigawa)|1=Koyasu Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q134926913}} - Located in Hatamachi, Hanamigawa Ward, Chiba City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Ichikawa)|ja|子安神社 (市川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Ichikawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135506300|1=Koyasu Shrine (Ichikawa)}} - Located in Kashiwaimachi, Ichikawa City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Narashino)|ja|子安神社 (習志野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Narashino)|1=Koyasu Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11447897}} - Located in Fujisaki, Narashino City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Matsudo)|ja|子安神社 (松戸市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Matsudo)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135506301|1=Koyasu Shrine (Matsudo)}} - Located in Yagasaki, Matsudo City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Hachiman Shrine|ja|子安八幡神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Hachiman Shrine|1=Koyasu-Hachiman Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11447884}} - Located in Nakaiikegami and Kitakojiya, Ota Ward, Tokyo. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Hachioji)|ja|子安神社 (八王子市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Hachioji)|qq=}} - Located in Hachioji City, Tokyo. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Isehara)|ja|子安神社 (伊勢原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Isehara)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135506303|1=Koyasu Shrine (Isehara)}} - Located in Ishida, Isehara City, Kanagawa Prefecture.
== Chubu Region == * {{ill|Koyasumiya Shrine|ja|子安宮澤神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasumiya Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135506305|1=Koyasumiya Shrine}} - Located in Nigioka Town, Otsuki City, Yamanashi Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Hachiman Shrine (Kofu)|ja|子安八幡神社 (甲府市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Hachiman Shrine (Kofu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135506307|1=Koyasu Hachiman Shrine (Kofu)}} - Located in Kokubo, Kofu City, Yamanashi Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Kawazu)|ja|子安神社 (河津町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Kawazu)|1=Koyasu Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q130647084}} - Located in Nawa, Kawazu Town, Kamo District, Shizuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Shimbashi Sengen Shrine|ja|新橋浅間神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimbashi Sengen Shrine|1=Niihashi Sengen Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q122790140}} - Koyasu Shrine as a subordinate shrine of Shimbashi Sengen Shrine, Gotemba City, Shizuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Fujinomiya)|ja|子安神社 (富士宮市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Fujinomiya)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135506309|1=Koyasu Shrine (Fujinomiya)}} - Located in Sugita, Fujinomiya City, Shizuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Hachimangu (Fujinomiya)|ja|子安八幡宮 (富士宮市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Hachimangu (Fujinomiya)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135506310|1=Koyasu Hachimangu (Fujinomiya)}} - Located in Numakubo, Fujinomiya City, Shizuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Hamamatsu)|ja|子安神社 (浜松市東区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Hamamatsu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135506312|1=Koyasu Shrine (Hamamatsu)}} - Located in Shiratori Town, Hamamatsu City, Shizuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Gifu)|ja|子安神社 (岐阜市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Gifu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135506314|1=Koyasu Shrine (Gifu)}} - Located in Hikosaka, Gifu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Ogaki)|ja|子安神社 (大垣市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Ogaki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135506317|1=Koyasu Shrine (Ogaki)}} - Located in Akasaka Town, Ogaki City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Obu)|ja|子安神社 (大府市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Obu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135506319|1=Koyasu Shrine (Obu)}} - Located in Kyowa Town, Obu City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Kaga)|ja|子安神社 (加賀市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Kaga)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135506320|1=Koyasu Shrine (Kaga)}} - Located in Kosugawara Town, Kaga City, Ishikawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Kanazawa)|ja|子安神社 (金沢市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Kanazawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135506323|1=Koyasu Shrine (Kanazawa)}} - Located in Shimoasahara Town, Kanazawa City, Ishikawa Prefecture.
== Kinki Region == * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Ise)|ja|子安神社 (伊勢市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Ise)|qq=}} - Located in Ise City, Mie Prefecture, under the jurisdiction of the {{ill|Inner Shrine|ja|皇大神宮|1=Kōtai Jingū|2=ja|3=皇大神宮|4=zh|5=皇大神宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inner Shrine|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtai Jingū|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Kihoku)|ja|子安神社 (紀宝町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Kihoku)|1=Kōnōchi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11447895}} - Located in Jinai, Kiho Town, Minami-Muro District, Mie Prefecture.
== Chugoku Region == * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Okayama)|ja|子安神社 (岡山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Okayama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135506325|1=Koyasu Shrine (Okayama)}} - Located in Kita Ward, Okayama City, Okayama Prefecture. A subordinate shrine of {{ill|Kibitsuhiko Shrine|en|Kibitsuhiko Shrine|WD=Q500763|lt=Kibitsuhiko Shrine|1=Kibitsuhiko Shrine}}.

'''Koyasu Shrine''' (子安神社) is a type of {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} primarily dedicated to deities associated with [[safe childbirth]] and [[:en:child-rearing|child-rearing]].
Shrines are generally divided into those enshrining [[Konohanasakuya-hime]], who is also the deity of {{ill|Mount Fuji|en|Mount Fuji|qid=Q39231|lt=Mount Fuji|1=Mount Fuji}} (and the main deity of [[:en:Sengen Shrine|Sengen Shrine]]), and those enshrining [[Kushinadahime]], the wife of [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]]. Both deities are genealogically related, with the former being the child and the latter being the grandchild of [[Ōyamatsumi]].
== Kanto Region == * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Mito)|ja|子安神社 (水戸市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Mito)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Chidami, Mito City, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Kasumigaura)|ja|子安神社 (かすみがうら市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Kasumigaura)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135506294|1=Koyasu Shrine (Kasumigaura)}} - Located in Higashinoji, Kasumigaura City, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Tone)|ja|子安神社 (利根町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Tone)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135506297|1=Koyasu Shrine (Tone)}} - Located in Obusa, Tone Town, Kita-Soma District, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Sakurai Koyasu Shrine|ja|櫻井子安神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakurai Koyasu Shrine|qq=}} - Located in Sakurai, Asahi City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Sosa)|ja|子安神社 (匝瑳市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Sosa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135506298|1=Koyasu Shrine (Sosa)}} - Located in Yokoshiba, Sosa City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Koyasu Shrine (Hanamigawa)|ja|子安神社 (千葉市花見川区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koyasu Shrine (Hanamigawa)|1=Koyasu Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q134926913}} -
